---
title: "Instructive Picture Book, or, Lessons from the Vegetable World, The. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe,” and “The Herb of the Field”,"
---

## Instructive Picture Book, or, Lessons from the Vegetable World, The. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe,” and “The Herb of the Field”,

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1857
**Genre:** Non-fiction: natural history
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** Edmonston & Douglas, 87 Princes Street, Edinburgh.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
